statusLine.command:
bash -c '
  INPUT=$(cat)
  CWD=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"workspace\",{}).get(\"current_dir\") or d.get(\"cwd\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null)
  [ -z "$CWD" ] && CWD=$(pwd)
  ABS=$(realpath "$CWD" 2>/dev/null || echo "$CWD$CTX")
  REPO_ROOT=$(realpath "$HOME/repo" 2>/dev/null || echo "$HOME/repo$CTX")

  BRANCH=$(git -C "$CWD" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null)

  CTX=$(printf "%s" "$INPUT" | bash "$HOME/.claude/statusline-context.sh" 2>/dev/null)

  # Strip ~/repo/ prefix
  case "$ABS" in
    "$REPO_ROOT"/*)
      REL="${ABS#$REPO_ROOT/}"
      ;;
    *)
      if [ -n "$BRANCH" ]; then
        echo " $(basename $CTX"$ABS")   $BRANCH"
      else
        echo " $(basename $CTX"$ABS")"
      fi
      exit 0
      ;;
  esac

  # REL examples:
  #   aks-devinfra
  #   aks-devinfra/.worktrees/feat-x
  #   aks-devinfra/.worktrees/feat-x/aks-rp
  PRIMARY="${REL%%/*}"
  REST="${REL#$PRIMARY}"
  REST="${REST#/}"

  WORKTREE=""
  SUBREPO=""
  case "$REST" in
    .worktrees/*)
      AFTER="${REST#.worktrees/}"
      WORKTREE="${AFTER%%/*}"
      SUBREPO="${AFTER#$WORKTREE}"
      SUBREPO="${SUBREPO#/}"
      ;;
  esac

  REPO="$PRIMARY"
  if [ -n "$SUBREPO" ]; then
    # Show only first segment of subrepo path
    REPO="$PRIMARY/${SUBREPO%%/*}"
  fi

  [ -z "$BRANCH" ] && BRANCH="-"

  if [ -n "$WORKTREE" ]; then
    echo " $REPO  󰘬 $WORKTREE   $BRANCH$CTX"
  else
    echo " $REPO   $BRANCH$CTX"
  fi
'
